title: Lemon Curd Pavlova
excerpt: Lemon Curd Pavlova Ingredients 4 egg yolks 150 g caster sugar 100 ml fresh lemon juice Zest of one lemon, finely grated 90 g butter Pinch of salt 250 ml cream berries of your choice mint leaves A pavlova shell bought from your deli or supermarket Method Put a pot of boiling water on the stove Put …
html:
Lemon Curd Pavlova

Ingredients

  • 4 egg yolks
  • 150 g caster sugar
  • 100 ml fresh lemon juice
  • Zest of one lemon, finely grated
  • 90 g butter
  • Pinch of salt
  • 250 ml cream
  • berries of your choice
  • mint leaves
  • A pavlova shell bought from your deli or supermarket

 

Method

  1. Put a pot of boiling water on the stove
  2. Set a glass bowl on top of the pot. The bowl must not touch the water. The water should simmer gently
  3. Melt the butter in your glass bowl and take it off the stove
  4. Whisk the rest of the ingredients into the butter and set your glass bowl back on the pot
  5. Now whisk for about 12 minutes until it starts to thicken. Use a balloon whisk. If you drag a spoon through and pull a line with your finger and it doesn't close up, your curd is ready
  6. Pour into a small bottle or jar. Put it in the fridge

NOW: Whip 250 ml cream to soft peaks. Fold your lemon curd into the whipped cream. Spread it in the base of the Pavlova. Arrange the berries of your choice and mint leaves on top of the lemon filling
